case_title: TREVOR DUNBAR VS. ELISE ELISE MCILVEEN

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY MCILVEEN, ELISE ELISE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DUNBAR, TREVOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE BY THE SHERIFF DEPT., "SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF BAD ADDRESS". (SERVICE FEE $35.00) FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT MCILVEEN, ELISE ELISE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DUNBAR, TREVOR

CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MCILVEEN, ELISE ELISE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY DUNBAR, TREVOR MCILVEEN, ELISE ELISE
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY DUNBAR, TREVOR AS TO DEFENDANT MCILVEEN, ELISE ELISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED NOV-01-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MCILVEEN, ELISE ELISE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. CROSS-DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNBAR, TREVOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCILVEEN, ELISE ELISE $4,602.11 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,687.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MCILVEEN, ELISE ELISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DUNBAR, TREVOR DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON CROSS-CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
